title: Crispy Croatian Corned Beef Croquettes
description: Savory, crispy croquettes featuring tender corned beef, fluffy mashed potatoes, and a crunchy breadcrumb coating.

ingredients.name: Corned beef (cooked, shredded)
ingredients.notes: use sliced deli corned beef, drained of excess liquid

instructions: Boil the potatoes until fork‑soft, then drain and mash them to a smooth consistency.
In a large bowl, combine the shredded corned beef, mashed potatoes, grated Parmesan, chopped onion, minced garlic, parsley, paprika, pepper, and salt; mix until well incorporated.
Shape the mixture into small balls, about 35g each, and place them on a sheet for cooling.
Dredge each ball in flour, then dip into beaten eggs, and finally roll in breadcrumbs until fully coated.
Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large skillet over medium‑high heat. When the oil shimmers, carefully place the croquettes in the pan.
Fry the croquettes 3–4 minutes per side or until golden brown and crispy. Flip them gently to ensure even browning.
Transfer the cooked croquettes to a paper‑towel‑lined plate to absorb excess oil.
Serve hot with a side of mustard or a light yogurt sauce for dipping.
